hero.title: Smile with Confidence
hero.subtitle: Enjoy world-class dental care using the latest technologies with a team of experienced professionals dedicated to your perfect smile.

services.title: Our Services
services.subtitle: Comprehensive solutions for dental care for the whole family
services.fillingRootCanalDesc: Advanced root canal treatment to save infected and painful teeth.
services.fillingRegularDesc: Safe and effective filling for simple cavities and tooth restoration.
services.fillingCosmeticDesc: Cosmetic filling with color matching natural teeth for a beautiful appearance.
services.fillingRegularKidsDesc: Safe and gentle filling specifically for children without pain or fear.
services.fillingRootCanalKidsDesc: Safe and effective root canal treatment for children preserving natural teeth.
services.fixedProstheticsDesc: Fixed dental prosthetics that are safe, durable and look like natural teeth.
services.removableProstheticsDesc: Removable prosthetics that can be easily removed and cleaned.
services.scalingDesc: Professional deep cleaning to remove tartar, plaque and treat gum inflammation.
services.extractionDesc: Safe and effective tooth extraction for damaged teeth using modern techniques.
services.teethCleaningDesc: Professional cleaning to remove tartar and plaque, keeping your teeth healthy and bright.
services.teethWhiteningDesc: Advanced whitening techniques for a bright smile in just one session.
services.dentalImplantsDesc: A permanent solution for replacing missing teeth that looks and feels like natural teeth.
services.rootCanalDesc: Advanced treatment to save infected or damaged teeth.
services.hollywoodSmileDesc: Comprehensive smile enhancement with veneers and cosmetic procedures.

about.specialty: Doctor of Dental Medicine - Specialist in Dental Restorations and Cosmetics
about.bio: Dr. Ahmed has practical and real experience working with patients and various dental cases. He works with professionalism and expertise to improve his patients' smiles. He is committed to providing safe and personalized care using the latest advanced dental techniques and methods.

beforeAfter.title: Success Stories
beforeAfter.subtitle: See real patient results with our advanced dental treatments

testimonials.title: Patient Reviews
testimonials.testimonial1: Excellent service and a very professional doctor! I didn't feel any pain and the results were amazing.
testimonials.testimonial2: The best dental clinic I've ever visited. The staff is friendly and the clinic is very clean.
testimonials.testimonial3: Thank you for the great attention and excellent care. I will definitely return.
